subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enamoured of the celestial Beloved! Praise be to God that through pilgrimage to the sacred Tomb, the eyes were illumined and the soul became the dawning-place of lights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مفتون دلبر آسمانی الحمد لله از زیارت تربت مقدسه بصر جلا یافت جان مطلع انوار
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
